enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog from Boulder, discussing his work on a cycling division structure project he is designing around ancient Roman chariot race frequencies, then mentions sleeping in to recover from exhaustion before signing off.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: close to finishing but the new pages will take at least a full day each
24 divisions modeled on ancient Roman chariot races is the right framework, split by age and sex
was too burnt out and exhausted to work or film earlier, needed to sleep
